description: lib.rs:268 — test 'remove_zeroes_and_returns_true' claims to verify zeroing, but only checks the boolean return. The zeroize guarantee comes from Zeroizing<Vec<u8>>'s Drop impl, which this test does not exercise or observe. Either rename to 'remove_returns_true_then_false' to match what it actually tests, or drop the 'zeroes' claim from the name entirely. The zeroing property is structural (type-level) and not something a unit test can easily verify at runtime, so the honest fix is just a rename.
title: Test name overpromises: remove_zeroes_and_returns_true
